mapper.select:
SELECT ar.document_id AS id, ar.achievement_doc_id AS resultId, ar.achievement_title AS resultTitle, t.type_name AS resultType, m.achievement_status AS resultStatus, m.project_name AS projectName, m.visibility_range AS visibility, ar.requester_id AS userId, ar.requester_name AS userName, ar.reason AS reason, ar.status AS status, ar.reviewer_name AS reviewer, ar.review_comment AS comment, ar.created_at AS createdAt, ar.reviewed_at AS reviewedAt FROM achievement_access_requests ar LEFT JOIN achievement_mains m ON m.id = ( SELECT m1.id FROM achievement_mains m1 WHERE m1.document_id = ar.achievement_doc_id AND m1.is_delete = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN m1.published_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC, m1.updated_at DESC, m1.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN achievement_types t ON t.id = ( SELECT t1.id FROM achievement_mains_achievement_type_id_lnk mt1 JOIN achievement_types t1 ON t1.id = mt1.achievement_type_id AND (t1.is_delete IS NULL OR t1.is_delete = 0) WHERE mt1.achievement_main_id = m.id ORDER BY CASE WHEN mt1.achievement_main_ord IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, mt1.achievement_main_ord ASC, CASE WHEN t1.published_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END DESC, t1.updated_at DESC, t1.id DESC LIMIT 1 ) WHERE ar.is_delete = 0
AND ( ar.achievement_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') OR ar.requester_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{dto.keyword}, '%') )
AND ar.status = #{dto.status}
ORDER BY CASE ar.status WHEN 'pending' THEN 1 WHEN 'approved' THEN 2 WHEN 'rejected' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, ar.created_at DESC
